---
title: West Side Story
author: Raphaële Slimane
image: https://res.cloudinary.com/dyjfju0u4/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/v1784557610/westsidestory_20220101_ciimrr.png
description: West Side Story
categories: [fanart]
date: 2022-01-01
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
---

![](https://res.cloudinary.com/dyjfju0u4/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/v1784557610/westsidestory_20220101_ciimrr.png)
